title: Create a new story draft and see it in the stories list
description: Verifies a creator can create a new story with a required title and the new story appears in the stories list after saving.

steps.description: Fill "Test Story TC001" into the story title field
Verify the new story appears in the stories list

title: Create a story, add a chapter with rich text and illustration, and confirm it persists after refresh
description: Verifies a creator can add a chapter, write rich text, attach an illustration, save, refresh, and still see the chapter, content, and illustration in the draft outline and editor.

steps.description: Fill "Test Story TC004" into the story title field
Open the draft editor for "Test Story TC004"
Fill "Chapter 1" into the chapter title field
Enter rich text content into the chapter editor
Upload a valid portrait-format image file as the chapter illustration
Verify the chapter is listed in the draft outline and its content and illustration are present

title: Edit story metadata from story details and see updates reflected in the list
description: Verifies a creator can open a story’s details, update metadata, save, and see the updated metadata reflected back in the stories list.

steps.description: Fill "Test Story TC002" into the story title field
Open the story details for "Test Story TC002"
Edit the story metadata fields with valid values
Click the navigation control to return to the stories list
Verify the stories list reflects the updated story metadata

title: Update dossier alias, bio, and avatar and see preview reflect saved changes
description: Verifies a creator can update alias, bio, and avatar on Settings and that the dossier preview reflects the saved updates.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with superadmin@funggawari.com
Fill in the password field with FungaW@ri2026!
Click the link to open settings
Fill "Agent Alias QA" into the alias field
Fill "QA bio update for automated test." into the bio field
Upload a valid image file as the avatar
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the dossier preview displays the updated alias, bio, and avatar

title: Upload an image asset and see it appear in the library grid
description: Verifies a creator can select image asset type, upload a valid image file, and see the uploaded image appear in the asset grid.

steps.description: Verify the uploaded image asset appears in the asset grid

title: Saved dossier changes persist after page reload
description: Verifies that after saving dossier updates, reloading the page rehydrates the latest saved alias and bio in the Settings view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with superadmin@funggawari.com
Fill in the password field with FungaW@ri2026!
Click the link to open settings
Fill "Reload persistence check." into the bio field
Verify the bio field shows "Reload persistence check."

title: Delete a chapter and confirm it is removed from the draft outline
description: Verifies a creator can add a chapter, delete it, and the chapter is removed from the draft outline after the delete action completes.

steps.description: Fill "Test Story TC005" into the story title field
Open the draft editor for "Test Story TC005"
Fill "Chapter To Delete" into the chapter title field
Delete the chapter named "Chapter To Delete"
Verify the deleted chapter no longer appears in the draft outline

title: Cancel avatar change before saving keeps previously saved avatar
description: Verifies a creator can abandon an avatar change and the previously saved avatar remains unchanged in the dossier preview.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with superadmin@funggawari.com
Fill in the password field with FungaW@ri2026!
Click the link to open settings
Upload a valid image file as the avatar
Verify the avatar in the dossier preview remains unchanged from before the upload
Verify there is no indication that changes were saved

title: Assign tags or metadata to an uploaded asset and confirm it persists after refresh
description: Verifies a creator can upload an asset, assign tags or metadata, refresh the page, and still see the metadata displayed for the asset in the grid.

steps.description: Open the uploaded asset details or edit panel from the grid
Assign a tag "tc009" to the asset
Verify the asset shows the tag "tc009" in the library grid or asset details

title: Unsaved text changes are not persisted when leaving settings without saving
description: Verifies that editing alias/bio without saving does not persist after navigating away and returning to Settings.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with superadmin@funggawari.com
Fill in the password field with FungaW@ri2026!
Click the link to open settings
Fill "This should not persist without save." into the bio field
Click the link to open stories
Click the link to open settings
Verify the Settings fields do not show the unsaved alias and bio values

title: Prevent saving when alias is too short and allow correction
description: Verifies that entering a too-short alias blocks saving with an inline validation error and that correcting the alias allows saving.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with superadmin@funggawari.com
Fill in the password field with FungaW@ri2026!
Click the link to open settings
Verify an alias validation error is visible
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Require a title when creating a new story
description: Verifies the create story flow blocks submission without a required title and shows an inline validation error without creating a story.

steps.description: Verify a title validation error is visible

title: Block unsupported chapter illustration file types
description: Verifies the illustration uploader rejects an unsupported file type and shows a file validation error without attaching an illustration.

steps.description: Fill "Test Story TC006" into the story title field
Open the draft editor for "Test Story TC006"
Attempt to upload an unsupported file type as the chapter illustration
Verify an illustration file validation error is visible

title: Reject unsupported or oversized asset uploads in the library
description: Verifies the library upload flow blocks an unsupported or oversized file and shows an inline validation error without adding a new asset to the grid.

steps.description: Attempt to upload an unsupported or oversized file
Verify an upload validation error is visible
